header_normalization: trim, collapse internal whitespace/newlines to a single space, uppercase
source_file_reference: KILLER - EAN CODE WISE SALE 23-24 TO 25-26.xlsb, sheet '23-24 TO 25-26 SALE REPORT'

validation_rules.divide_by_zero_guard: if mrp_value == 0, discount_pct is null, not an error
notes: NEW EAN CODE and EAN CODE are identical in every sampled row; NEW EAN CODE is primary, EAN CODE is a fallback only (used if NEW EAN CODE is blank), not double-captured to extra.

PARTY NAME (AS PER STORE SIGNAGE) and NAME are near-duplicate store-name columns (differ only in spacing/punctuation) in sampled data; NAME is canonical store_name, the other is preserved in extra for audit.

TYPE is mapped to store_type per the client's column mapping, but is observed constant ('SALE') across the full 748k-row historical file as of Day 0 -- currently non-discriminative; re-verify once a brand/file shows a differing value.
BRAND column is redundant with the (brand, product_line) upload context that selects this config; not treated as authoritative, captured to extra for audit only.
CLSNG QTY / CLSNG VALUE are Phase 2 (SoH) fields; captured in extra now, not dropped, not used by any Phase 1 view.
